query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_inconsistentes
FROM warehouseLocations wl
WHERE wl.status = 'occupied'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM inventory i 
  WHERE i.locationId = wl.id AND i.quantity > 0
);
